top_signals.title: Goldman Sachs to Lead SpaceX’s Mega-IPO Bank Lineup
top_signals.summary: Goldman Sachs Group Inc. has the leading role on the cover of SpaceX’s initial public offering, according to people familiar with the matter, giving the firm a prominent position in potentially the biggest listing of all time.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Two Japanese attacked with knife at Shanghai restaurant
top_signals.summary: Following the incident, the Japanese Embassy in China sent out an email advising Japanese nationals in the country to exercise vigilance.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
